name: 清春とTOSHI-LOWの俊春まかせ
overview:
Kiyoharu, frontman of Kuroyume, who has made a comeback after a 10-year hiatus, and TOSHI-LOW, vocalist of BRAHMAN, embark on a carefree ‘stroll’ through Nanao City in Ishikawa Prefecture.

Music, the town, the people, and their respective outlooks on life—

A special street-walking shoot where the true faces and honest thoughts of these two men, rarely seen in public, intersect.

Exclusively broadcast as a Space Shower TV original programme.

Originally aired in March 2026.
